name: Diabolic Dragon Fortress - Draluvice
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>閣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ドラルヴァイス
desc: ''The ultimate fate of the huntress who continued to spread the dragontaint. Now she has become the source of the plague, a fortress of swirling dark, wicked thoughts, and ironically is now the target of others' revenge. She has no way of knowing that the strike team standing before her are the survivors of a village that was once decimated by a dragon.''
flavor: The ultimate fate of the huntress who continued to spread the dragontaint. Now she has become the source of the plague, a fortress of swirling dark, wicked thoughts, and ironically is now the target of others' revenge. She has no way of knowing that the strike team standing before her are the survivors of a village that was once decimated by a dragon.
